fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Denotational world-indexed logical relations and friends
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @phdthesis{thamsborg-2010, author = {Thamsborg, {Jacob Junker}}, address = {Denmark}, school = {IT-Universitetet i K{\o{}}benhavn}, year = {2010}, title = {Denotational World-indexed Logical Relations and Friends}, }

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: The category-theoretic solution of recursive metric-space equations
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @article{birkedal-støvring-thamsborg-2010-solution, author = {Birkedal, Lars and St\o{}vring, Kristian and Thamsborg, Jacob}, address = {GBR}, publisher = {Elsevier Science Publishers Ltd.}, year = {2010}, month = oct, doi = {10.1016/j.tcs.2010.07.010}, issn = {0304-3975}, journal = {Theoretical Computer Science}, number = {47}, pages = {4102--4122}, title = {The Category-Theoretic Solution of Recursive Metric-Space Equations}, volume = {411}, }

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Realisability semantics of parametric polymorphism, general references and recursive types
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @article{birkedal-støvring-thamsborg-2010-realisability, author = {Birkedal, Lars and St\o{}vring, Kristian and Thamsborg, Jacob}, publisher = {Cambridge University Press}, year = {2010}, doi = {10.1017/S0960129510000162}, journal = {Mathematical Structures in Computer Science}, number = {4}, pages = {655--703}, title = {Realisability semantics of parametric polymorphism, general references and recursive types}, volume = {20}, }
